_cloudflare_dns_notes.proxy_mode: Set Cloudflare DNS records to Proxied (orange cloud) for DDoS protection and Turnstile CAPTCHA

security_settings.turnstile: Create widget at dash.cloudflare.com then add VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY to Vercel env vars
security_settings.waf_rules: Enable Cloudflare WAF on Pro plan for additional bot protection

env_vars_needed: VITE_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY - Cloudflare Turnstile site key (public, used by frontend widget)
TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY - Cloudflare Turnstile secret key (server-side, use in edge functions for verification)
